$comment: Research goal body schema. Validates the STRUCTURE of a research goal's body as exposed by the jit projection under `sections`. A compliant goal must have a `## Hypotheses` section with at least one item shaped `H-N: <text>`, and at least one of those items must be marked `[hard]` (the hard-hypothesis check). A `## Success Criteria` section is required by a separate `require-section` rule; it is not re-checked here. Section keys are the slugified headings the jit projection emits: `## Hypotheses` -> `hypotheses`.
